firmware.title: Galaxy Nexus Software Update
firmware.description: This software update will update your Galaxy Nexus device with the latest version of Android (ITL41F) which contains an important bug fix.

firmware.title: Android 4.0.4 System Update
firmware.description: This system update for your Galaxy Nexus brings you the latest version of Android (4.0.4), with performance improvements, increased stability and bug fixes. Android Market has also been upgraded to the Google Play Store, where you can find apps, games, and much more.

firmware.title: Android 4.1 System Update
firmware.description: This software update will upgrade your Galaxy Nexus to Android 4.1 Jelly Bean, which improves performance and responsiveness system wide. Swipe up from the bottom of the screen to search on Google and get suggestions from Google Now. Organize your home screens easily even when they’re packed with apps and widgets. Expand notifications with a pinch to get more info and take action. Swipe within camera to easily view and share your photos. Jelly Bean contains many more features and improvements. To find out more, please visit http://www.android.com/whatsnew/#jelly-bean.

firmware.title: Android 4.3 System Update
firmware.description: This software update will upgrade your Galaxy Nexus to Android 4.3 Jelly Bean, which improves performance and stability. Look up contacts right from the dial pad if you turn on the feature from phone settings. Capture your thoughts on the go with Google Keep. To find out more, visit http://www.android.com/about/jelly-bean/.
